Off A167, signposted Ketton Hall Farms. Access is a private road that leads to residential properties.. No access by HGV or low loader vehicles as there are no turning areas. If RRV or heavy machinery is to be accessed to trackside it should be driven along the lane from the A167. However this does not include driving Steel tracked vehicles on Ketton Lane as it would damage the road surface. Rubber tyre or tracked vehicles only. The A167 is a 60mph road so if RRVs or plant is to be unloaded then it is necessary to either do this away from the entrance to Ketton Lane or to have a 1/2 road closure with Traffic management to ensure safety of Members of the public. The Access has a fenced parking area so staff must not park on ketton lane as it will affect residential access.

~

~
